ogTitle: Harolds Cross vs Harparary: Climate Safety

heading: Harolds Cross vs Harparary — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Harolds Cross, New South Wales and Harparary, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Harolds Cross has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Harparary (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Harolds Cross or Harparary safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Harolds Cross has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Harparary scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Harolds Cross scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Harparary scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Harolds Cross or Harparary?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Harolds Cross has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
